highlights.text: Ubud → Seminyak → Uluwatu romantic honeymoon circuit
Tegalalang Rice Terraces & Sacred Monkey Forest
Premium beach clubs, couple's spa & cafe culture
Uluwatu Temple & Kecak Fire Dance at sunset

itinerary.title: Premium Bali Honeymoon
itinerary.overview: Embark on an enchanting TRAGUIN curated Bali honeymoon designed for intimate moments, breathtaking landscapes, and premium stays. From the lush jungles of Ubud to the romantic sunsets of Uluwatu, every detail is crafted for an unforgettable romantic escape on the Island of the Gods.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Bali honeymoon (ID-001): Ubud, Seminyak, Uluwatu Temple, Kecak Fire Dance, rice terraces, and Sacred Monkey Forest.

days.title: Arrival in Bali — The Romantic Beginning
days.description: Arrive at Denpasar Airport and receive a warm TRAGUIN welcome. Transfer to your handpicked hotel in Ubud. Enjoy a candlelit dinner to start your romantic journey.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private transfer to Ubud

days.title: Ubud — Cultural Immersion
days.description: Visit the Tegalalang Rice Terraces and the Sacred Monkey Forest. Immerse yourselves in the culture of Bali with curated experiences in local markets.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tegalalang Rice Terraces, Sacred Monkey Forest, local markets

days.title: Ubud to Seminyak — Scenic Transfer
days.description: Travel to Seminyak, exploring waterfalls along the way. Enjoy the scenic beauty of Bali's coast.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic transfer with waterfall stops

days.title: Seminyak — Beach Bliss
days.description: Relax at premium beach clubs or indulge in a couple's spa treatment. Enjoy the vibrant shopping and cafe culture.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Beach club leisure, couple's spa treatment

days.title: Uluwatu — Sunset Romance
days.description: Visit the iconic Uluwatu Temple. Witness the mesmerizing Kecak Fire Dance at sunset, one of the top tourist places in Bali.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Uluwatu Temple, Kecak Fire Dance at sunset
Overnight Stay: Uluwatu / Seminyak (Premium Handpicked Hotel)

days.title: Departure
days.description: Enjoy breakfast before your transfer to the airport. TRAGUIN ensures a seamless departure after your unforgettable memories.

inclusions.text: 05 Nights premium accommodation across Ubud, Seminyak, and Uluwatu
TRAGUIN expert assistance throughout the tour
International airfare and Indonesia visa on arrival fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
